disclaimer: DESIGN-ONLY spec. Not enforced. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims are made. Specs must not include buy/sell/hold/action fields.
purpose: Capture the gate result and classification for a named data source, documenting PIT-safety status, approval level, publication-lag assumptions, and schema migration state. A source-gate artifact represents the authoritative record of whether a data source has been approved to participate in the pipeline.

phase.description: Producing phase identifier, e.g. P29I, P30, P32

capturedAt.description: Timestamp when this gate result was captured

sourceName.description: Canonical source name: Quote | Regime | Chip | MonthlyRevenue | FinancialReport | NewsEvent

gateResult.description: Overall gate classification for this source

entersAlphaScore.description: Whether this source is permitted to contribute to alphaScore. Must be false for all current sources under paper-only governance.

disclaimer.description: Governance disclaimer text asserting this is not investment advice

dbTable.description: Prisma model name for this source's primary table

dateField.description: Primary temporal gate field used for PIT comparison

dateFormat.description: Expected date format description (e.g. ISO YYYY-MM-DD)

asOfDateHandling.description: Description of how asOf is normalised and propagated before the DB gate

futureDataRisk.description: Risk narrative for latent or confirmed future-data contamination

publicationLagDocumented.description: Whether T+N publication lag assumption has been documented

migrationArtifactCreated.description: Whether a DB migration artifact for this source exists

migrationApplied.description: Whether the migration has been applied to dev/prod DB

citedArtifacts.description: Prior phase artifact filenames that informed this gate result

fieldTypeExpectations.entersAlphaScore: boolean — must be false for all sources at current paper-only stage
fieldTypeExpectations.gateResult: One of the listed enum values. No buy/sell/hold semantics.
fieldTypeExpectations.phase: String matching phase identifier pattern (P + digits + optional letter suffix)

mappedArtifacts.mapping: requiredFields.sourceName, requiredFields.gateResult, optionalFields.dbTable, optionalFields.dateField, optionalFields.asOfDateHandling, optionalFields.futureDataRisk

exampleSnippet._note: SYNTHESIZED EXAMPLE — not real data. Does not constitute investment advice.
exampleSnippet.futureDataRisk: Latent only if future-dated records enter DB; current sync ingests past dates only
exampleSnippet.disclaimer: SYNTHESIZED EXAMPLE. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims.
